hooks.command: f=/tmp/spacegame-memory-ts; t=$(date +%s); [ -f "$f" ] && [ $((t - $(cat "$f"))) -lt 300 ] && exit 0; echo $t > "$f"; claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model us.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0 -p "Update ~/.claude/projects/-Users-pavol-virdzek-dev-playground-spacegame/memory/MEMORY.md to reflect this session: files changed, design decisions, bugs fixed, git status. Update existing entries, add only genuinely new ones. Be concise."
